name: TedsWoodworking
price: from ~$67 (often discounted on the official page)
pros: 16,000+ ready-made woodworking plans with step-by-step diagrams
Evergreen, beginner-friendly niche with a large audience
Backed by ClickBank's standard 60-day money-back guarantee
Top ClickBank seller for 10+ years (proven funnel)
cons: Plans are digital (downloads), not physical books
Some upsells presented after purchase
Best results require a basic tool set to follow along
summary: A large digital library of woodworking plans aimed at hobbyists who want clear, step-by-step blueprints for furniture, sheds, and DIY projects.
best_for: DIY and woodworking hobbyists who want ready-to-build plans instead of designing from scratch

name: ProDentim
pros: One of the top-converting offers in the dental niche
Probiotic chewable format (easy to take)
60-day money-back guarantee via ClickBank
High average order value = larger commissions per sale
cons: A dietary supplement, not a medical treatment — results vary by person
Marketing claims are the vendor's and are not independently verified
Best value requires buying multi-bottle bundles
summary: An oral-health probiotic supplement marketed for supporting teeth and gum health. Popular, high-converting offer in the dental category.
best_for: people interested in oral-health supplements who prefer a chewable probiotic

Vendor health claims are not independently verified
